CHANGE-89248.description: Description The Next Steps check list item reads “"Потратьте 5 долларов ..." for country_code=ru , this should be displayed in Russian rubles (₽), not USD. This is both a localization and UX issue. The free promotion banner uses "25 Р." — the official modern symbol for Russian rubles is ₽ . Prerequisites Have at least 25 signatures in order for notification banner to appear. CHANGE-88788.description: Description On the petition dashboard, the Petition strength card displays the message “Room for improvement” . The text wraps incorrectly, splitting the word “improvement” into two lines (e.g., improveme on one line and nt on the next). This appears to be caused by improper text wrapping or container width handling within the component. The text should wrap only at word boundaries or remain on a single line depending on the layout. The issue is visible in the Petition overview → Petition streng

translationSuggestions.tab: Change.orgのサイト上およびEメールを使って、賛同を得られそうな人々に対してこの署名ページを表示します。
translationSuggestions.component: 「プロモーション支援」で応援すると、Change.orgのサイト内やメール配信での表示回数がアップします。わずかな額でもたくさんの方からご支援があれば、数千、数万人の方々に、このオンライン署名を知らせることができます。
